<ac>It began in a world much like this o: <ac>It began in a world much like this one.
ADREST: In my time, the world was held t: ADREST: In my time, the world was held together by a single continent.
A world where humans and Arceus lived in: A world where humans and Arceus lived in harmony. Together.
ADREST: I lived in the nation of Eclysia: ADREST: I lived in the nation of Eclysia. In the capital, Myridian.
Myridian was the city that pioneered the: Myridian was the city that pioneered the development of science in our world.
It was here where I lived with my mother: It was here where I lived with my mother, Variya.
Together we worked at the largest compan: Together we worked at the largest company in the region...
Humanity soon discovered physical eviden: Humanity soon discovered physical evidence of what we know as a \c[6]Soul.
It turned out that it was something that: It turned out that it was something that can be tampered with.
The Soul could be used to transcend huma: The Soul could be used to transcend humanity into a new entity of existence.
A world where humans could become someth: A world where humans could become something "better".
Arceus had learned about this research.
And as a way to \"protect\" humanity fro: And as a way to "protect" humanity from its own demise...
Arceus demanded that the research behind: Arceus demanded that the research behind the Soul cease immediately.
But humanity didn't give up that easily.
All 7 nations gathered to discuss what t: All 7 nations gathered to discuss what transpired with their God.
And unanimously decided that a presence: And unanimously decided that a presence of a God impeded on their development as a species.
Arceus' body dissolved into black partic: Arceus' body dissolved into black particles, and what remained was the golden arch it carried.
Its particles reached the sky until none: Its particles reached the sky until none of it existed anymore.
What felt more like a victory, felt more: What felt more like a victory, felt more like a tragedy.
The great deity that looked over humanit: The great deity that looked over humanity was gone.
Humanity went far enough to destroy thei: Humanity went far enough to destroy their own creator, but...
\\c[2]Little did they know that they des: \c[2]Little did they know that they destroyed their sustainer as well.
Humans could no longer reproduce. Pokémo: Humans could no longer reproduce. Pokémon could no longer lay eggs.
The rushing waters began to slow, and so: The rushing waters began to slow, and soon the Earth itself stopped turning.
Pokémon around the world began to dissol: Pokémon around the world began to dissolve the same way Arceus did.
It wasn't long until Pokémon went into \: It wasn't long until Pokémon went into \c[2]complete extinction.
When Pokémon were soon declared extinct,: When Pokémon were soon declared extinct, a true horror began.
Human beings started to slowly dissolve: Human beings started to slowly dissolve as well.
In a desperate and panicked attempt to r: In a desperate and panicked attempt to recoup, Garufa Incorporated retrieved the Golden Arch Arceus had left behind.
They were tasked with finding a way to c: They were tasked with finding a way to create their own sustainer.
Using the Arch left behind, Garufa Inc. created the Archetype.
A way to channel the power of Arceus thr: A way to channel the power of Arceus through the human body.
Thousands of volunteers gathered at the: Thousands of volunteers gathered at the company to attempt at becoming the new sustainer for all humanity.
However, the power of the Archetype was: However, the power of the Archetype was too much for the majority.
Those who were capable of handling it we: Those who were capable of handling it were shown to be granted extreme power and abilities.
Garufa Inc. saw the potential in this an: Garufa Inc. saw the potential in this and began to weaponize it.
The remaining 4 nations took heed of thi: The remaining 4 nations took heed of this and began attacking Eclysia so that they could use the Archetype for their own purposes.
Variya realized that if things continued: Variya realized that if things continued this way, the world would surely end.
But then as if a gift from the heavens a: But then as if a gift from the heavens above, a meteor struck the nation of Torvenbyuen.
The giant rock was filled with a seeming: The giant rock was filled with a seemingly limitless amount of energy and potential.
Unwilling to give up her life to the sel: Unwilling to give up her life to the selfishness of man, Variya developed a final plan.
Variya gathered supporters from the rema: Variya gathered supporters from the remaining nations and overthrew Garufa Inc.
It was then that she took hold of Archet: It was then that she took hold of Archetype and used its power to construct 7 pyramids.
One in each of their respective nation.
Through our Pyramid, Eclysia, Variya use: Through our Pyramid, Eclysia, Variya used the Archetype's power to create a portal to the center of the Earth.
She and her supporters built thousands o: She and her supporters built thousands of connected super computers at the center of Earth.
Using the material from the meteor, and: Using the material from the meteor, and the culmination of knowledge humanity had built...
Variya designed a program that would cre: Variya designed a program that would create a method for the world to self sustain.
The Soul of a single human being holds t: The Soul of a single human being holds tremendous power.
When a person dies, their soul is left b: When a person dies, their soul is left behind to wander aimlessly forever.
Using the core, any soul left behind by: Using the core, any soul left behind by the deceased would be recycled through the Core's mechanisms.
And a new person would be born from the: And a new person would be born from the remnants.
Using this method, the power of the core: Using this method, the power of the core itself could rejuvenate the planet and save humanity from their inevitable extinction.
But for this to happen, Variya would nee: But for this to happen, Variya would need the power to active the program.
With this, Variya would absorb the souls: With this, Variya would absorb the souls of the remaining people and commit genocide.
But even if the plan worked, the new bor: But even if the plan worked, the new born humans would be left alone.
Variya constructed a pseudo-Arceus body: Variya constructed a pseudo-Arceus body that would be exempt from this utter destruction.
18 souls that could handle the Archetype: 18 souls that could handle the Archetype would have their souls merged into one and inhabit the artificial body.
They would become the new God of the new: They would become the new God of the new world, and be known as the Overseer.
The procedure was complete, and Variya w: The procedure was complete, and Variya was ready to put things into motion.
But the final remaining empire, Lestheri: But the final remaining empire, Lestherio, attacked Eclysia Pyramid.
I was at the pyramid helping my mother c: I was at the pyramid helping my mother complete the process of activating the Reset System.
But during the struggle, one of our 18 v: But during the struggle, one of our 18 volunteers had been killed.
And I was forced to be the 18th and fina: And I was forced to be the 18th and final soul to complete Arceus.
My mother activated the Reset System and: My mother activated the Reset System and my soul was merged with the other 17.
This world was torn apart and dragged be: This world was torn apart and dragged beneath the ground to make way for the new world.
And with one final flash of bright light: And with one final flash of bright light from The Core, the world had been completely reset.
The old world had vanished-- Without a v: The old world had vanished-- Without a visible trace.
